fields.name: ConfirmText
fields.fieldText:
Hours Awaiting Confirmation

These hours must be approved by yourself. Use the relevant actions to edit or cancel any hours and manage breaks.

fields.name: Confirmed_Text
fields.fieldText:
Confirmed Hours

These hours have already been confirmed and are awaiting payment

fields.name: FutureText_0
fields.fieldText:
Upcoming Hours

These are all hours due to be worked in the future

value.stringValue: Go Back to Confirm My Hours

fields.name: PastShift_0
fields.fieldText:
Previously Worked Hours

These are all your hours that have been paid

textTemplates.name: ClientRejected
textTemplates.text: Rejected
